raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves left ahead with delta +16.1° to waypoint 32, so I apply 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve smoothly.
knowledge: Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683
Large left-curving loop begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases rapidly)
Car is slightly left of center (~0.13m) but all wheels on track — acceptable
Use steering_angle=15 for delta 15-20° entering curve at speed 1.5
After the left curve, track loops back and returns — full circuit ~17.7m
Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and moderate curves
Curve sharpens at wp27-35 (y increases from 1.0 to 2.0), monitor delta closely
Car heading increasing from ~0° to ~42° confirming we are deep in the left curve
Delta ~16° at wp32 confirms moderate left curve — maintain 15° left steering
Heading increasing steadily each step (~6-7°/step) — curve is consistent and predictable
